CATALYST-GROW_POWER.description: Attacks deal more damage. At the end of its turn, it loses 1 [gold]Grow[/gold].
CATALYST-GROW_POWER.smartDescription: [gold]{OwnerName}'s[/gold] Attacks deal [blue]{DamageIncrease}%[/blue] more damage. At the end of {OnPlayer:your|its} turn, {OnPlayer:lose|loses} 1 [gold]Grow[/gold].
CATALYST-GROW_POWER.title: Grow
CATALYST-CONCENTRATION_POWER.title: Concentration
CATALYST-CONCENTRATION_EFFECT_FROM_THE_E: From the Earth: [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Grow[/gold] to self and [blue]{LevitateAmount}[/blue] [gold]Levitate[/gold] to all enemies.
CATALYST-FLOATING_POWER.description: After this creature performs an Attack, it takes damage equal to its [gold]Levitate[/gold]. At the end of its turn, it loses 1 [gold]Levitate[/gold].
CATALYST-FLOATING_POWER.smartDescription: After [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] performs an Attack, it takes [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage. At the end of {OnPlayer:your|its} turn, {OnPlayer:lose|loses} 1 [gold]Levitate[/gold].
CATALYST-FLOATING_POWER.title: Levitate
CATALYST-FROM_THE_EARTH_POWER.descriptio: At the start of each of your turns, begin Concentrating again. Each stack prepares 1 [gold]Grow[/gold] to self and 2 [gold]Levitate[/gold] to all enemies.
CATALYST-FROM_THE_EARTH_POWER.smartDescr: At the start of each of [gold]{OwnerName}'s[/gold] turns, begin Concentrating again. Each stack prepares [blue]{GrowPerStack}[/blue] [gold]Grow[/gold] to self, and [blue]{LevitatePerStack}[/blue] [gold]Levitate[/gold] to all enemies.
CATALYST-FROM_THE_EARTH_POWER.title: From the Earth
CATALYST-IMPROMPTU_SHIELD_POWER.title: ImpromptuShield
CATALYST-TEMPERATURE_POWER.description: The room's [gold]Temperature[/gold] is negative when cold and positive when hot. Its value ranges from -3 to +3.
CATALYST-TEMPERATURE_POWER.smartDescript: The room's [gold]Temperature[/gold] is [blue]{Amount}[/blue]. Negative values are colder; positive values are hotter.
CATALYST-TEMPERATURE_POWER.title: Temperature
CATALYST-POWER_TRIP_POWER.description: Whenever you gain [gold]Grow[/gold] 3 times in a row, double your [gold]Grow[/gold].
CATALYST-POWER_TRIP_POWER.smartDescripti: Whenever [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] gains [gold]Grow[/gold] 3 times in a row, double [gold]{OwnerName}'s[/gold] [gold]Grow[/gold].
CATALYST-POWER_TRIP_POWER.title: Power Trip
CATALYST-UNIVERSE_FORM_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, gain {GrowAmount} [gold]Grow[/gold] and add 1 [gold]Lust[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold] for each stack. Increase Grow every turn.
CATALYST-UNIVERSE_FORM_POWER.smartDescri: At the start of [gold]{OwnerName}'s[/gold] turn, gain [blue]{GrowAmount}[/blue] [gold]Grow[/gold] and add 1 [gold]Lust[/gold] to their [gold]Hand[/gold] for each stack. Increase Grow every turn.
CATALYST-UNIVERSE_FORM_POWER.title: Universe Form
CATALYST-LUST_NEXT_TURN_POWER.descriptio: At the start of your next turn, add {Amount} [gold]Lust[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
CATALYST-LUST_NEXT_TURN_POWER.smartDescr: At the start of [gold]{OwnerName}'s[/gold] next turn, add [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Lust[/gold] to their [gold]Hand[/gold].
CATALYST-LUST_NEXT_TURN_POWER.title: Lust
